case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. UNION SERVICE COMPANY, INC. AND ITS SUCCESSORS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNION SERVICE COMPANY, INC.
